event_description: A yellow or orange tractor pulling a long white box trailer is tracked from an airborne platform while driving steadily along a highway corridor. The camera alternates between closer oblique views and very wide overhead views, causing strong scale changes and occasional edge occlusion from the imaging platform. Cross-modal interpretation is most useful for preserving target identity across changing scale and for distinguishing the warmer tractor from the cooler trailer during long-range tracking.

group_scoring_recommendation.C1: Use squared-ratio consistency scoring for the eight-step parallel cue chain.
group_scoring_recommendation.H1: Prefer prefix scoring because the four questions form a cue-chain verdict.

notes.annotation_visibility_warning: Do not export main_event, event_description, answer, option_roles, evidence_note, rationales, or time_reference metadata to model prompts.
notes.design_revision_note: Video-reasoning v15 text-gate repair r2: options are neutral cue-pair choices with same-scene distractors, reducing answerability from wording alone.
acceptance_gates: Run request key-path leakage audit after export.
Run Qwen text-only/no-video baseline before video inference.
Reject samples or templates whose text-only accuracy suggests wording shortcuts.
Keep evidence_note fields internal; they are for annotation audit only.

qa.question: In the early EO segment, which cue pairing is visible for the object?

options.A: the object with tractor-to-trailer coupling; nearby highway traffic nearby
options.B: the object with nearby highway traffic; tractor-to-trailer coupling nearby
options.C: the object with lane edges, shoulders, fields, or road markings; roadside shadows or field texture nearby
options.D: the object with roadside shadows or field texture; road-following motion through scale changes nearby

qa.evidence_note: the tractor-trailer pairing persists despite edge occlusion and strong scale changes

qa.question: Across the EO scale or angle change, which motion cue stays paired with the object?

options.A: nearby highway traffic; view scale or angle changes
options.B: lane edges, shoulders, fields, or road markings; view scale or angle changes
options.C: roadside shadows or field texture; view scale or angle changes
options.D: tractor-to-trailer coupling; view scale or angle changes

qa.evidence_note: the tractor-trailer pairing persists despite edge occlusion and strong scale changes

options.C: vehicle heat against pavement or field background; tractor-to-trailer coupling
options.D: vehicle heat against pavement or field background; roadside shadows or field texture
